## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open VS Code with Grok Mode installed
2. Run command `Grok Mode: ...`
3. Speak: "..."
4. Observe error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages from the Output panel (`Grok Mode` channel).

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| VS Code version | |
| Extension version | |
| OS | |
| TTS engine (`grokMode.ttsEngine`) | |
| Whisper model (`grokMode.whisperModel`) | |
| SoX installed? | Yes / No |
